description: Pixel-style sprites, retro fonts, CRT effects, neon colors, and classic arcade UI patterns.

crt-screen.description: CRT scanline effect on game screen
crt-screen.css: .game-screen { position:relative; background:#000; border:3px solid #333; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,255,65,0.15), inset 0 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .game-screen::after { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 4px); pointer-events:none; }

sprite-renderer.description: Renders pixel sprites from grid arrays
sprite-renderer.js: function renderSprite(grid,colors,scale){scale=scale||4;const h=grid.length,w=grid[0].length;let svg='<svg viewBox="0 0 '+(w*scale)+' '+(h*scale)+'" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">';for(let y=0;y<h;y++)for(let x=0;x<w;x++){const c=colors[grid[y][x]];if(c)svg+='<rect x="'+(x*scale)+'" y="'+(y*scale)+'" width="'+scale+'" height="'+scale+'" fill="'+c+'"/>';}return svg+'</svg>';}
